name: Crockpot Sweet/Sour Kraut with Pork Chops
recipeIngredient: 2 Thick pork chops, trimmed of fat
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the potatoes in the crockpot.
2. Top with chopped onion.
3. Combine sauerkraut, brown sugar, and pineapple juice (1 can) in a separate bowl.
4. Spoon the mixture over the potatoes.
5. Place the pork chops on top, ensuring they are trimmed of fat.
6. Season with pepper to taste.
7. Cover and cook on low for 8-10 hours.
8. Serve with rye bread and microwave baked apples.
